name: accounting firms processing 10–20 reimbursement claims/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 reimbursement claims/month, inefficient processing causes delayed approvals. We automate claim extraction instead of manual email tracking and spreadsheet compilation.
problem_solved: inefficient processing of employee reimbursement claims
